title: Ochinai Yogore wo Boku wa Nanto Yobeba Yokatta noka
titleRomaji: Ochinai Yogore wo Boku wa Nanto Yobeba Yokatta noka
titleNative: 落ちない汚れを僕は何と呼べばよかったのか
synonyms: What Was I Meant to Call This Mess That Wouldn't Go Away?
synopsis: This world is filthy… Nakayama, a high school boy with an extreme case of germophobia, avoids all social interaction and tries to enjoy his private time alone in a perfectly clean space. But his peaceful days are constantly disrupted by Nishino-san, the cheerful and unpredictable girl who ends up sitting next to him. "Don’t pollute my sanctuary! Don’t intrude on my time!" Contrary to his wishes, day after day, Nakayama is at Nishino's mercy in this chatty rom-com about a germophobe and an unsophisticated high school girl!! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Meaheim
titleNative: メアヘイム
synopsis: Rotten fruit returns to the branch, and gold drips down like water, A land where events beyond reason occur, a land known as “Meichi” (The Underworld) that easily claims the lives of those who dare to enter. The scholar "Ren" arrives in this godforsaken land to save his sick younger brother. Together with the guide "Tobia", "Ren" embarks on a perilous journey to obtain the “panacea,” an ancient relic of “Meichi.” A genuine dark fantasy brought to you by "Tsurubuchi Kenji", creator of “Touge Oni,” and "Konata", a rising star of the Spanish comic world. (Source: Comic Days, translated)

synopsis: Within the safety of the walls, youths are raised in a nursery-style setting by robots. While life there may appear stale on the surface, the children are full of potential and curiosity. In many ways it is like a slice of heaven. The outside world is a hell-s

title: Koppa Maichiru Sono Koro ni
titleNative: 木っ端舞い散る その頃に
synopsis: Kei Maebara gets a job!! The bizarre and eerie world of public service, depicted by Ryukishi07, from Higurashi When They Cry . In the 13th year of the Heisei era, in the Tokyo Metropolitan Area, Coastal Region... Due to the prolonged economic recession, the police force has weakened, and the growing number of disillusioned youth turning to semi-criminal lifestyles has led to a drastic decline in public safety... Amidst all this, Kei Maebara begins working at the district office. Can he become a respectable public servant? (Source: Akita Shoten, translated)

title: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleRomaji: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleNative: 断頭台に消えた伝説の悪女、二度目の人生ではガリ勉地味眼鏡になって平穏を望む
synonyms: The Legendary Wicked Woman Wants a Peaceful Second Life as a Boring Studious Girl
synopsis: "Don’t you think it’s stupid to be so madly in love?" Princess Letitia is due to be executed by guillotine, for the terrible crimes she committed trying to win back her fiancee's love. However, just when she thought she was dead, she was returned back in time for a second chance at life. "I won’t fall in love in my new life. I’m going to live peacefully by becoming a sober, hard-working student with glasses!” But one day, her glasses slip off and Camilo, the school's superstar, sees her true face. Then, for some reason, Camilo begins to dote on her in a tidal wave of affection…!? (Source: Comic Days, translated)

title: The (Poisoned) Invincible Poison Magician
titleNative: （毒殺された）世界無双の毒魔法使い
synopsis: Londo Von Edward was born as the illegitimate child of a noble. Since he seemed to have no magical abilities his family considered him worthless. When he came of age at 15, his father, ordered him to drink poison so it would seem like he had committed suicide. Londo sees so other option than to drink the poison. However, instead of killing him, the poison causes a magic symbol to appear on his back and awakens his ability to use poison magic. Realizing that his life is not over yet, he uses his newfound power to make his escape from the family that cast him aside and start life anew. (Source: Mangamo)
chapterSourceTitle: (Dokusatsu Sareta) Sekai Musou no Doku Mahoutsukai

title: Mazinkaiser SKL Versus
titleNative: マジンカイザーSKLヴァーサス
synopsis: The manga details the adventures of the Skull Force, a special forces team affiliated with WSO composed of several members including the Death Caprice Squad composed of Ken Kaido and Ryo Magami, a pair of pilots personally selected to pilot the Mazinkaizer SKL a powerful battle robot that many other pilots failed to control.

title: Jipchang Malgo, Ihonhae Juseyo!
titleNative: 집착 말고, 이혼해 주세요!
synonyms: I Want a Divorce, Please Stop Obsessing Over Me!
Don’t Be Obsessed, Let’s Get a Divorce!
synopsis: Edelis Brill, the beloved only daughter of a countess, sees herself stabbed to death by the emperor's sword in a book she discovers in her study. Seeking to change her fate, Edelis rescues the book's sole main character, the slave gladiator Lehan, and pours her endless affection into him. But! Lehan, whom she believed would protect her from the emperor's blade, has returned as the emperor, intent on her heart?! Edelis tries to escape, but Lehan's obsession grows ever stronger... Stop obsessing, divorce me! (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: This Villainess Just Wants to Take It Easy!I finally broke off the engagement, but now the second prince is totally stalking me!
titleRomaji: Akuyaku Reijou wa Slow Life wo Enjoy Shitai!: Yatto Konyaku Haki sareta noni, Daini Ouji ga Meccha Stalker Shitekurun desu kedo…
titleEnglish: This Villainess Just Wants to Take It Easy!I finally broke off the engagement, but now the second prince is totally stalking me!
titleNative: 悪役令嬢はスローライフをエンジョイしたい！～やっと婚約破棄されたのに、第二王子がめっちゃストーカーしてくるんですけど…～
synopsis: Finally, the moment she's been waiting for - her engagement annulment! At her graduation ceremony, villainess Sylvia is hit with the classic line from the crown prince: "I hereby annul our engagement!" To which Sylvia replies with a dazzling smile and an enthusiastic "Gladly!" Falsely accused of bullying her lover, Sylvia proves her innocence with a flawless alibi. She couldn't have bullied anyone while she was picking radishes in a dungeon! Armed with a hefty settlement for her troubles and her S-Rank adventurer's license, Sylvia retires to a quiet farm to finally live out her dream of taking it easy. But just as everything starts to go to plan, her ex-fiancé's younger brother, the second prince, shows up at her door suspecting treason and moves in with her, upending her easygoing life! A delightfully chaotic, sometimes wholesome, romantic adventure awaits! (Source: Magazine House, translated)

tags.name: Villainess

title: An Adventurer's Daily Grind at Age 29
titleEnglish: An Adventurer's Daily Grind at Age 29
titleNative: 29歳独身中堅冒険者の日常
synonyms: Everyday of the 29 years old single person adventurer.
synopsis: One day, while dungeon-diving for work, Hajime the adventurer encounters a starving girl named Rirui. The poor girl has been abandoned by her parents and has no relatives she can rely on. Unable to turn a blind eye, Hajime declares, "If you're gonna join my party, then stop crying!" So begins their life together...but as it turns out, Rirui is no ordinary little girl! (Source: K MANGA)

title: The Hunter's Gonna Lay Low
titleNative: 헌터는 조용히 살고 싶다
synonyms: The Hunter Wants to Live Quietly
synopsis: Life's never quiet when you've got S-Rank Rizz. Former S-Rank Hunter Ui-Jae, a.k.a. J, saved humanity from eldritch horrors emerging from dimensional rifts, only to time-leap 8 years into a future where he's presumed dead. Now a manager at a hangover soup joint, all J wants is a quiet life. But between selling off the relics of his past and catching the obsessive attention of Korea's #1 Hunter Sa-Yeong, peace isn't on the menu! (Source: Manta, edited)

title: Kimi no Yokogao shika Mirenai
titleNative: 君の横顔しか見れない
synopsis: The popular Fujimori Sachi never faces Kishimoto Arata, who sits next to her in class. No matter how hard Kishimoto tries to see her face, she brilliantly turns away from him. As a result, he has only ever seen her side profile. But she talks to him normally otherwise. This mysterious girl seems to have a secret...? A cute school romantic comedy about a girl who only shows her side profile VS a boy who won't give up ♪ Originally a web manga released on the author's Twitter account since May 7, 2019. Official serialization began in Comic Gene on August 16, 2020.

title: Mokuyobi no Ice-Cream
titleNative: 木曜日のアイスクリーム
synopsis: "When I came home from my ex-lover's funeral and entered the room where we lived together, I saw a white butterfly fly out of the refrigerator..." Contains 16 short stories in which the everyday and the extraordinary, the human and the non-human, coexist. - Azayakana Danmen (鮮やかな断面) - Na Mo Naki Asa (名もなき朝) - Platform (プラットホーム) - Kuchisake-san (くちさけさん) - Lunch Time (ランチタイム) - Nikui Tsumasaki (憎い爪先) - Semi Shirazu (蝉しらず) - Ima wa Kagiri (いまはかぎり) - Katachi ga Onajinara (かたちが同じなら) - Mayonaka, Bakubaku to (真夜中、ばくばくと) - Yoru ni Tsutsumaru (夜に包まる) - Hour Time (アワータイム) - Tanin Yogari (他人よがり) - 365 Po no Koshin (365歩の行進) - Mokuyobi (もくようび)

title: Houkago, Boku wa Kimi ni Naru
titleRomaji: Houkago, Boku wa Kimi ni Naru
titleNative: 放課後、ぼくは君になる
synopsis: Akiba, a high school boy who is seriously into cross-dressing cosplay, devotes himself to emulating his "oshi." Then one day, while he was dressing up as his favorite character, all alone in the club room, he is discovered by Shibuya, a gorgeous gal that he has a crush on...? This is the start of a secret relationship between these two polar opposites! They will devote their youthful enthusiasm to a life of "oshi promotion"! (Source: Shonen Sirius, translated)
